{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044505BF44564B3379C99E5826"}"},"total":10890},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7132510424566088460","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"希望能有后续啊，自己脑补很难受的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660667239,"group_id":"6962094410657958948","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2393005454535315"}},"expand":{"book_id":"6962094410657958948","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.2821672e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读30小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2027,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":109696,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7132509640755151627","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"首先代入感很强啊这个，写的让人很有画面感，主角队的能力值也是中规中矩，完全不像其他末世文牛逼哄哄的，就很有真实性，而且有末世的压抑感，作者很擅长把这些事件拆分成一个个小故事来讲，但是一个个小故事里埋下的伏笔也让他们串联起来，我个人感觉前中间的部分是最好看的，倒是结尾有点寥寥收场了，就好像是读者寄刀片吓到作者了一样，但总而言之结局也是咱比较乐意看到的，说实话看到主角团全灭的时候我是很难受的，这个结局倒是让我好受不少，书是写的挺好的，希望作者继续加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660667030,"group_id":"6962094410657958948","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1miEFR8/77zY/+m0tbO6yXM6URgXFznTjaxUhQDFuOM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7d62cbc851f64e9785ba57b311f8f36e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705711&x-signature=fIEm7NqIjiGzSrI0VE7IvLaH9hQ%3D","user_id":"2393005454535315","user_name":"是三三酱吖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2393005454535315","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6962094410657958948","book_info":{"abstract":"【完本西幻老书】【老作者新书保障】
背地从事着黑色职业的高中生白银，原本想去看看已被领养的妹妹。
却不料意外穿越一个平行世界。
末世降临，丧尸爆发。
在人类沦为丧尸口粮的同时:
“叮！系统绑定成功！”
“杀死十只丧尸，获得尸友者能力！”
白银成了唯一一个不会被丧尸攻击的人类。
为了找到妹妹，孤僻的少年踏上了他的末日旅途。
中途，他捡到了一条黑狗，双方从此结伴而行。
[黑子，在有的时候，比起丧尸，我们更应提防的是人……]
[汪汪！！！]
[嘘……小声点！]","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0fd0f8a88a6885014e4b080d4d5e8c28","author":"南妖叔","author_id":"","book_id":"6962094410657958948","book_name":"末世之只有我不被丧尸攻击","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":869,"name":"废土","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=869&name=废土&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6962135380489404936","read_count":"25930","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"556586"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"270","tags":"科幻末世,系统,穿越,末世,魂穿,废土","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/6ccac472624f0ab9054a6811815f1a08~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309905&x-signature=O6OCOcb4cWCQQqM0G%2BDMAJzP9mQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3035071884303220","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.2821672e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044505BF44564B3379C99E5826"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dura
